parameters.content:
## onchain-snapshotter (hourly)
Dash Platform + ZEC privacy metrics → `onchain.snapshots` (Supabase).
Sources (keyless GET): platform-explorer `/status` + `/transactions/shielded/statistic`, ZecHub shielded/total supply.
Normalize → 10 rows (`value_raw` as STRING) → executeQuery `jsonb_to_recordset` INSERT ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING (idempotent, dedup key source+asset+metric+ts_bucket).
Doc: DB-SCHEMA §2/§8. Owner: onchain-intel.

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO onchain.snapshots (ts, ts_bucket, source, asset, metric, value_raw, value_num, height, raw_json, created_at)
SELECT ts, ts_bucket, source, asset, metric, value_raw, value_num, height, raw_json, created_at
FROM jsonb_to_recordset($onchain${{ $json.rows_json }}$onchain$::jsonb)
  AS x(ts bigint, ts_bucket bigint, source text, asset text, metric text, value_raw text, value_num double precision, height bigint, raw_json text, created_at bigint)
ON CONFLICT (source, asset, metric, ts_bucket) DO NOTHING;
